        ],
        "originalContents": "\n\nconst initialState: CardsState = {\n  seed: DEFAULT_SEED,\n  decks: {\n    chance: initDeck(DEFAULT_SEED, 'chance'),\n    community: initDeck(DEFAULT_SEED, 'community'),\n    bus: initDeck(DEFAULT_SEED, 'bus'),\n  },\n};\n\nconst cardsSlice = createSlice({\n  name: 'cards',\n  initialState,\n  reducers: {\n    setSeed(state, action: PayloadAction\u003cnumber | string\u003e) {\n      state.seed = action.payload;\n      state.decks.chance = initDeck(state.seed, 'chance');\n      state.decks.community = initDeck(state.seed, 'community');\n      state.decks.bus = initDeck(state.seed, 'bus');\n    },\n    drawCard(state, action: PayloadAction\u003cCardDeck\u003e) {\n      const deckKey = action.payload;\n      const deck = state.decks[deckKey];\n      if (deck.drawPile.length === 0) {\n        const reshuffled = buildShuffledDeck(deckKey, &#96;${state.seed}:${deckKey}:r${deck.discardPile.length}&#96;);\n        deck.drawPile = reshuffled;\n        deck.discardPile = [];\n      }\n      const card = deck.drawPile.shift();\n      if (card) {\n        deck.discardPile.unshift(card);\n      }\n    },\n    putCardOnBottom(state, action: PayloadAction\u003c{ deck: CardDeck; cardId: string }\u003e) {\n      const { deck: deckKey, cardId } = action.payload;\n      const deck = state.decks[deckKey];\n      const idx = deck.discardPile.findIndex((c) =\u003e c.id === cardId);\n      if (idx \u003e= 0) {\n        const [card] = deck.discardPile.splice(idx, 1);\n        deck.drawPile.push(card);\n      }\n    },\n  },\n});\n\nexport const selectLastDrawnCard = (state: CardsState, deck: CardDeck): CardDefinition | null =\u003e {\n  const d = state.decks[deck];\n  return d.discardPile.length \u003e 0 ? d.discardPile[0] : null;\n};",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {

          },
          "startPosition": {

        "relativeWorkspacePath": "src/features/cards/cardsSlice.ts"

    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nconst initialState: SessionState = {\n  currentGameId: null,\n  racePot: defaultRacePot(),\n  turnIndex: 0,\n  freeParkingPot: 0,\n};\n\nconst sessionSlice = createSlice({\n  name: 'session',\n  initialState,\n  reducers: {\n    setCurrentGameId(state, action: PayloadAction\u003cstring | null\u003e) {\n      state.currentGameId = action.payload;\n    },\n    initializeRacePot(state, action: PayloadAction\u003c{ participants: string[]; amountPerPlayer: number }\u003e) {\n      // Backfill for persisted sessions that predate racePot\n      if (!state.racePot) state.racePot = defaultRacePot();\n      const { participants, amountPerPlayer } = action.payload;\n      if (participants.length \u003c 2 || state.racePot.active) return;\n      state.racePot.active = true;\n      state.racePot.participants = participants;\n      state.racePot.amount = participants.length * amountPerPlayer;\n      state.racePot.winnerId = null;\n    },\n    resetRacePot(state) {\n      state.racePot = defaultRacePot();\n    },\n    setRacePotWinner(state, action: PayloadAction\u003cstring\u003e) {\n      if (!state.racePot) state.racePot = defaultRacePot();\n      if (!state.racePot.active || state.racePot.winnerId) return;\n      state.racePot.winnerId = action.payload;\n    },\n    setTurnIndex(state, action: PayloadAction\u003cnumber\u003e) {\n      state.turnIndex = Math.max(0, action.payload);\n    },\n    advanceTurn(state, action: PayloadAction\u003c{ playerCount: number }\u003e) {\n      const n = action.payload.playerCount;\n      if (n \u003c= 0) {\n        state.turnIndex = 0;\n      } else {\n        state.turnIndex = (state.turnIndex + 1) % n;\n      }\n    },\n    addToFreeParking(state, action: PayloadAction\u003cnumber\u003e) {\n      state.freeParkingPot += action.payload;\n      if (state.freeParkingPot \u003c 0) state.freeParkingPot = 0;\n    },\n    resetFreeParking(state) {\n      state.freeParkingPot = 0;\n    },\n  },\n});\n\nexport const { setCurrentGameId, initializeRacePot, resetRacePot, setRacePotWinner, setTurnIndex, advanceTurn, addToFreeParking, resetFreeParking } = sessionSlice.actions;",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\n\nconst initialState: SessionState = {\n  currentGameId: null,\n  racePot: defaultRacePot(),\n  turnIndex: 0,\n  freeParkingPot: 0,\n};\n\nconst sessionSlice = createSlice({\n  name: 'session',\n  initialState,\n  reducers: {\n    setCurrentGameId(state, action: PayloadAction\u003cstring | null\u003e) {\n      state.currentGameId = action.payload;\n    },\n    initializeRacePot(state, action: PayloadAction\u003c{ participants: string[]; amountPerPlayer: number }\u003e) {\n      // Backfill for persisted sessions that predate racePot\n      if (!state.racePot) state.racePot = defaultRacePot();\n      const { participants, amountPerPlayer } = action.payload;\n      if (participants.length \u003c 2 || state.racePot.active) return;\n      state.racePot.active = true;\n      state.racePot.participants = participants;\n      state.racePot.amount = participants.length * amountPerPlayer;\n      state.racePot.winnerId = null;\n    },\n    resetRacePot(state) {\n      state.racePot = defaultRacePot();\n    },\n    setRacePotWinner(state, action: PayloadAction\u003cstring\u003e) {\n      if (!state.racePot) state.racePot = defaultRacePot();\n      if (!state.racePot.active || state.racePot.winnerId) return;\n      state.racePot.winnerId = action.payload;\n    },\n    setTurnIndex(state, action: PayloadAction\u003cnumber\u003e) {\n      state.turnIndex = Math.max(0, action.payload);\n    },\n    advanceTurn(state, action: PayloadAction\u003c{ playerCount: number }\u003e) {\n      const n = action.payload.playerCount;\n      if (n \u003c= 0) {\n        state.turnIndex = 0;\n      } else {\n        state.turnIndex = (state.turnIndex + 1) % n;\n      }\n    },\n    addToFreeParking(state, action: PayloadAction\u003cnumber\u003e) {\n      state.freeParkingPot += action.payload;\n      if (state.freeParkingPot \u003c 0) state.freeParkingPot = 0;\n    },\n    resetFreeParking(state) {\n      state.freeParkingPot = 0;\n    },\n  },\n});\n\nexport const { setCurrentGameId, initializeRacePot, resetRacePot, setRacePotWinner, setTurnIndex, advanceTurn, addToFreeParking, resetFreeParking } = sessionSlice.actions;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nconst initialState: CardsState = {\n  seed: DEFAULT_SEED,\n  decks: {\n    chance: initDeck(DEFAULT_SEED, 'chance'),\n    community: initDeck(DEFAULT_SEED, 'community'),\n    bus: initDeck(DEFAULT_SEED, 'bus'),\n  },\n};\n\nconst cardsSlice = createSlice({\n  name: 'cards',\n  initialState,\n  reducers: {\n    setSeed(state, action: PayloadAction\u003cnumber | string\u003e) {\n      state.seed = action.payload;\n      state.decks.chance = initDeck(state.seed, 'chance');\n      state.decks.community = initDeck(state.seed, 'community');\n      state.decks.bus = initDeck(state.seed, 'bus');\n    },\n    drawCard(state, action: PayloadAction\u003cCardDeck\u003e) {\n      const deckKey = action.payload;\n      const deck = state.decks[deckKey];\n      if (deck.drawPile.length === 0) {\n        const reshuffled = buildShuffledDeck(deckKey, &#96;${state.seed}:${deckKey}:r${deck.discardPile.length}&#96;);\n        deck.drawPile = reshuffled;\n        deck.discardPile = [];\n      }\n      const card = deck.drawPile.shift();\n      if (card) {\n        deck.discardPile.unshift(card);\n      }\n    },\n    putCardOnBottom(state, action: PayloadAction\u003c{ deck: CardDeck; cardId: string }\u003e) {\n      const { deck: deckKey, cardId } = action.payload;\n      const deck = state.decks[deckKey];\n      const idx = deck.discardPile.findIndex((c) =\u003e c.id === cardId);\n      if (idx \u003e= 0) {\n        const [card] = deck.discardPile.splice(idx, 1);\n        deck.drawPile.push(card);\n      }\n    },\n  },\n});\n\nexport const selectLastDrawnCard = (state: CardsState, deck: CardDeck): CardDefinition | null =\u003e {\n  const d = state.decks[deck];\n  return d.discardPile.length \u003e 0 ? d.discardPile[0] : null;\n};",

            "text": "        deck.discardPile = [];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "      }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "      const card = deck.drawPile.shift();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "      if (card) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "        deck.discardPile.unshift(card);"
          },

            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "      }"

            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "    },"
          },

            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "    putCardOnBottom(state, action: PayloadAction\u003c{ deck: CardDeck; cardId: string }\u003e) {"
          },

            "text": "      const { deck: deckKey, cardId } = action.payload;"

          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "      const deck = state.decks[deckKey];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "      const idx = deck.discardPile.findIndex((c) =\u003e c.id === cardId);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "      if (idx \u003e= 0) {"
          },

            "text": "        const [card] = deck.discardPile.splice(idx, 1);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 66,

            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "export const selectLastDrawnCard = (state: CardsState, deck: CardDeck): CardDefinition | null =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "  const d = state.decks[deck];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "  return d.discardPile.length \u003e 0 ? d.discardPile[0] : null;"
          },

            "text": "};"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "export const { setSeed, drawCard, putCardOnBottom } = cardsSlice.actions;"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\n\nconst initialState: CardsState = {\n  seed: DEFAULT_SEED,\n  decks: {\n    chance: initDeck(DEFAULT_SEED, 'chance'),\n    community: initDeck(DEFAULT_SEED, 'community'),\n    bus: initDeck(DEFAULT_SEED, 'bus'),\n  },\n};\n\nconst cardsSlice = createSlice({\n  name: 'cards',\n  initialState,\n  reducers: {\n    setSeed(state, action: PayloadAction\u003cnumber | string\u003e) {\n      state.seed = action.payload;\n      state.decks.chance = initDeck(state.seed, 'chance');\n      state.decks.community = initDeck(state.seed, 'community');\n      state.decks.bus = initDeck(state.seed, 'bus');\n    },\n    drawCard(state, action: PayloadAction\u003cCardDeck\u003e) {\n      const deckKey = action.payload;\n      const deck = state.decks[deckKey];\n      if (deck.drawPile.length === 0) {\n        const reshuffled = buildShuffledDeck(deckKey, &#96;${state.seed}:${deckKey}:r${deck.discardPile.length}&#96;);\n        deck.drawPile = reshuffled;\n        deck.discardPile = [];\n      }\n      const card = deck.drawPile.shift();\n      if (card) {\n        deck.discardPile.unshift(card);\n      }\n    },\n    putCardOnBottom(state, action: PayloadAction\u003c{ deck: CardDeck; cardId: string }\u003e) {\n      const { deck: deckKey, cardId } = action.payload;\n      const deck = state.decks[deckKey];\n      const idx = deck.discardPile.findIndex((c) =\u003e c.id === cardId);\n      if (idx \u003e= 0) {\n        const [card] = deck.discardPile.splice(idx, 1);\n        deck.drawPile.push(card);\n      }\n    },\n  },\n});\n\nexport const selectLastDrawnCard = (state: CardsState, deck: CardDeck): CardDefinition | null =\u003e {\n  const d = state.decks[deck];\n  return d.discardPile.length \u003e 0 ? d.discardPile[0] : null;\n};",

            "column": 73,
            "line": 72
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 16
          }
        },

        "contents": "export default function PlayConsole(): JSX.Element {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  // Reset confirmation if any die changes\n  React.useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    setRollConfirmed(false);\n  }, [d6A, d6B, special]);\n\n  // //#derived\n  const lastChance = cardsState.decks.chance.discardPile[0];\n  const lastCommunity = cardsState.decks.community.discardPile[0];\n  const lastBus = cardsState.decks.bus.discardPile[0];\n\n  const specialNumeric: number = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    if (special === '+1') return 1;\n    if (special === '-1') return -1;\n    if (typeof special === 'number') return special;\n    // Treat Bus (string) as 0 steps\n    return 0;\n  }, [special]);\n\n  const hasRoll = d6A !== null \u0026\u0026 d6B !== null; \n  const hasFullNumericRoll = d6A !== null \u0026\u0026 d6B !== null \u0026\u0026 typeof special === 'number';\n  const hasRollWithSpecialSelected = d6A !== null \u0026\u0026 d6B !== null \u0026\u0026 special !== null; // includes Bus\n  const requiresBusCard = special === 'Bus';\n  const rollTotal = (d6A ?? 0) + (d6B ?? 0) + specialNumeric;\n\n  const rollForEval: DieRoll | null = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    if (!hasRoll) return null;\n    const sp: SpecialDieFace = (special ?? 1) as SpecialDieFace; // fallback only for typing\n    return {\n      d6A: d6A as number,\n      d6B: d6B as number,\n      special: sp,\n      isDouble: (d6A as number) === (d6B as number),\n      isTriple: (d6A as number) === (d6B as number) \u0026\u0026 (typeof sp === 'number' ? sp === (d6A as number) : false),\n      isTripleOnes: (d6A as number) === 1 \u0026\u0026 (d6B as number) === 1 \u0026\u0026 sp === 1,\n    };\n  }, [d6A, d6B, special, hasRoll]);\n\n  const bankUnownedCount = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    return Object.values(propsState.byTileId).filter((ps) =\u003e ps \u0026\u0026 ps.ownerId === null).length;\n  }, [propsState.byTileId]);\n\n  const depotsInstalled = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    return BOARD_TILES.filter((t) =\u003e t.type === 'railroad').reduce((acc, t) =\u003e (propsState.byTileId[t.id]?.depotInstalled ?         "originalContents": "\n\n  // Reset confirmation if any die changes\n  React.useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    setRollConfirmed(false);\n  }, [d6A, d6B, special]);\n\n  // //#derived\n  const lastChance = cardsState.decks.chance.discardPile[0];\n  const lastCommunity = cardsState.decks.community.discardPile[0];\n  const lastBus = cardsState.decks.bus.discardPile[0];\n\n  const specialNumeric: number = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    if (special === '+1') return 1;\n    if (special === '-1') return -1;\n    if (typeof special === 'number') return special;\n    // Treat Bus (string) as 0 steps\n    return 0;\n  }, [special]);\n\n  const hasRoll = d6A !== null \u0026\u0026 d6B !== null; \n  const hasFullNumericRoll = d6A !== null \u0026\u0026 d6B !== null \u0026\u0026 typeof special === 'number';\n  const hasRollWithSpecialSelected = d6A !== null \u0026\u0026 d6B !== null \u0026\u0026 special !== null; // includes Bus\n  const requiresBusCard = special === 'Bus';\n  const rollTotal = (d6A ?? 0) + (d6B ?? 0) + specialNumeric;\n\n  const rollForEval: DieRoll | null = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    if (!hasRoll) return null;\n    const sp: SpecialDieFace = (special ?? 1) as SpecialDieFace; // fallback only for typing\n    return {\n      d6A: d6A as number,\n      d6B: d6B as number,\n      special: sp,\n      isDouble: (d6A as number) === (d6B as number),\n      isTriple: (d6A as number) === (d6B as number) \u0026\u0026 (typeof sp === 'number' ? sp === (d6A as number) : false),\n      isTripleOnes: (d6A as number) === 1 \u0026\u0026 (d6B as number) === 1 \u0026\u0026 sp === 1,\n    };\n  }, [d6A, d6B, special, hasRoll]);\n\n  const bankUnownedCount = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    return Object.values(propsState.byTileId).filter((ps) =\u003e ps \u0026\u0026 ps.ownerId === null).length;\n  }, [propsState.byTileId]);\n\n  const depotsInstalled = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    return BOARD_TILES.filter((t) =\u003e t.type === 'railroad').reduce((acc, t) =\u003e (propsState.byTileId[t.id]?.depotInstalled ? acc + 1 : acc), 0);\n  }, [propsState.byTileId]);",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nconst initialState: PropertiesState = {\n  byTileId: Object.fromEntries(\n    BOARD_TILES.filter((t) =\u003e t.type === 'property' || t.type === 'railroad' || t.type === 'utility').map((t) =\u003e [t.id, { ownerId: null, mortgaged: false, improvements: 0, depotInstalled: false }])\n  ),\n  housesRemaining: 32,\n  hotelsRemaining: 12,\n};\n\nfunction getGroupTileIds(tileId: string): string[] {\n  const tile = BOARD_TILES.find((t) =\u003e t.id === tileId);\n  if (!tile) return [];\n  if (tile.type !== 'property' || !tile.group) return [tileId];\n  return BOARD_TILES.filter((t) =\u003e t.type === 'property' \u0026\u0026 t.group === tile.group).map((t) =\u003e t.id);\n}",

        "contents": "\n\nconst initialState: PlayersState = {\n  players: [],\n};\n\nconst playersSlice = createSlice({\n  name: 'players',\n  initialState,\n  reducers: {\n    addPlayer(state, action: PayloadAction\u003cOmit\u003cPlayerLite, 'positionIndex'\u003e\u003e) {\n      state.players.push({ positionIndex: 0, racePotOptIn: false, busTickets: 0, gojfChance: 0, gojfCommunity: 0, ...action.payload });\n    }",

- End Turn gating: I added an extra guard so holding the End Turn button won’t start unless Special=Bus has a selected Bus card. It’s also disabled visually until then. This should prevent ending the turn before resolving the Bus draw.

- Player HUD ownership: Adjusted ownership badges to pull from `properties.byTileId[tid].ownerId === player.id` instead of `p.properties.includes(tid)`, so it always reflects actual ownership state.

  - Bank props “Bank Props”
  - Deck counts “C”, “CC”, and “🚌”

- Tightened End Turn disable logic for unresolved Bus draws (both disabled state and hold-start guard).
- Fixed property ownership display in the player HUD to source from the properties slice. Build is green.

     { id: 0 as const, title: 'Pre Action', desc: preAction || 'None' },
     { id: 1 as const, title: 'Roll', desc: rollSummary },
     { id: 2 as const, title: 'Post-action', desc: postAction || 'None' },
   ];
+
+  const rentRequiredButNotSelected = (): boolean =&gt; {
+    const idx = predictedTo ?? currentIndex;
+    const t = getTileByIndex(idx);
+    if (!(t.type === 'property' || t.type === 'railroad' || t.type === 'utility')) return false;
+    const ps = propsState.byTileId[t.id];
+    const owner = ps?.ownerId as string | null;
+    const mortgaged = ps?.mortgaged === true;
+    const pid = players[turnIndex]?.id || players[0]?.id;
+    const mustPay = !!owner &amp;&amp; owner !== pid &amp;&amp; !mortgaged;
+    if (!mustPay) return false;
+    return !rentSelected;
+  };
*** End Patch
```

_**Agent (gpt-5)**_

- Pay Rent toggle:
  - The “Pay Rent” quick-action is now a toggle button with the same behavior as “Buy for $X” and “Draw Bus”.
  - First press activates it and shows a checkmark; pressing again unchecks. Only one rent can be toggled for the current tile.
  - The actual money transfer executes on End Turn (like Buy). 

- End Turn gating:
  - End Turn stays disabled and the hold cannot start if rent is required but not toggled on.
  - This combines with the existing Bus gating: if Special=Bus, End Turn is disabled until a Bus card is selected.

- Labeling:
  - The rent button label shows “Pay {ownerNickname} ${amount} for {propertyName}{(H1..H4|Hotel|Skyscraper)}”.

Summary:
- Added `rentSelected` state, made “Pay Rent” a toggle with a checkmark, gated End Turn on required rent being selected, and applied rent on End Turn. Build is green.

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="apply_patch">
<details>
        <summary>Tool use: **apply_patch** • Apply patch for /Users/pabloaguilar/Dropbox/code/monopolytracker/src/components/atoms/TogglePillButton.tsx</summary>
      

```diff
&lt;&lt;'PATCH'
*** Begin Patch
+import React from 'react';
+
+type Variant = 'rose' | 'orange' | 'emerald' | 'blue' | 'slate';
+
+export interface TogglePillButtonProps {
+  label: React.ReactNode;
+  active: boolean;
+  onToggle: () =&gt; void;
+  disabled?: boolean;
+  variant?: Variant;
+}
+
+function classesFor(variant: Variant, active: boolean): string {
+  const base = 'inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-semibold shadow select-none';
+  if (active) {
+    switch (variant) {
+      case 'rose':
+        return &#96;${base} bg-rose-600 text-white&#96;;
+      case 'orange':
+        return &#96;${base} bg-orange-600 text-white&#96;;
+      case 'emerald':
+        return &#96;${base} bg-emerald-600 text-white&#96;;
+      case 'blue':
+        return &#96;${base} bg-blue-600 text-white&#96;;
+      default:
+        return &#96;${base} bg-slate-700 text-white&#96;;
+    }
+  }
+  switch (variant) {
+    case 'rose':
+      return &#96;${base} bg-transparent border border-rose-500 text-rose-700 dark:text-rose-300 hover:bg-rose-50 dark:hover:bg-rose-900/30&#96;;
+    case 'orange':
+      return &#96;${base} bg-transparent border border-orange-500 text-orange-700 dark:text-orange-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30&#96;;
+    case 'emerald':
+      return &#96;${base} bg-transparent border border-emerald-500 text-emerald-700 dark:text-emerald-300 hover:bg-emerald-50 dark:hover:bg-emerald-900/30&#96;;
+    case 'blue':
+      return &#96;${base} bg-transparent border border-blue-500 text-blue-700 dark:text-blue-300 hover:bg-blue-50 dark:hover:bg-blue-900/30&#96;;
+    default:
+      return &#96;${base} bg-transparent border border-slate-500 text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-900/30&#96;;
+  }
+}
+
+export default function TogglePillButton({ label, active, onToggle, disabled, variant = 'slate' }: TogglePillButtonProps): JSX.Element {
+  return (
+    &lt;button type="button" disabled={disabled} onClick={onToggle} className={classesFor(variant, active)}&gt;
+      {active &amp;&amp; &lt;span className="mr-1"&gt;✓&lt;/span&gt;}
+      {label}
+    &lt;/button&gt;
+  );
+}
+
*** End Patch
PATCH
```

</details>
</tool-use>

+                              price={price}

+                              selected={buySelected}
+                              onToggle={() =&gt; {
+                                const next = !buySelected;
+                                setBuySelected(next);
+                                setPostAction(next ? 'Buy Property' : postAction === 'Buy Property' ? 'None' : postAction);
+                              }}
+                              bgClass={bgClass}
+                              textClass={textClass}
+                              borderClass={borderClass}
+                              textStrongClass={textStrongClass}
+                            /&gt;
+                          );

```diff
&lt;&lt;'PATCH'
*** Begin Patch
+import React from 'react';
+
+export interface DiceSelectorProps {
+  d6A: number | null;
+  d6B: number | null;
+  special: string | number | null;
+  onSelectA: (n: number) =&gt; void;
+  onSelectB: (n: number) =&gt; void;
+  onSelectSpecial: (v: string | number) =&gt; void;
+}
+
+function btnClass(active: boolean): string {
+  return &#96;inline-flex items-center justify-center h-8 min-w-8 rounded-md border px-2 text-sm font-medium ${
+    active ? 'bg-emerald-600 border-emerald-600 text-white' : 'bg-white dark:bg-neutral-900 border-neutral-300 dark:border-neutral-700 text-neutral-800 dark:text-neutral-100 hover:bg-neutral-50 dark:hover:bg-neutral-800'
+  }&#96;;
+}
+
+export default function DiceSelector({ d6A, d6B, special, onSelectA, onSelectB, onSelectSpecial }: DiceSelectorProps): JSX.Element {
+  return (
+    &lt;div className="space-y-2"&gt;
+      &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap"&gt;
+        &lt;span className="text-xs opacity-80 w-12"&gt;D6 A:&lt;/span&gt;
+        {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6].map((n) =&gt; (
+          &lt;button key={&#96;a-${n}&#96;} type="button" className={btnClass(d6A === n)} onClick={() =&gt; onSelectA(n)}&gt;
+            {n}
+          &lt;/button&gt;
+        ))}
+      &lt;/div&gt;
+      &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap"&gt;
+        &lt;span className="text-xs opacity-80 w-12"&gt;D6 B:&lt;/span&gt;
+        {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6].map((n) =&gt; (
+          &lt;button key={&#96;b-${n}&#96;} type="button" className={btnClass(d6B === n)} onClick={() =&gt; onSelectB(n)}&gt;
+            {n}
+          &lt;/button&gt;
+        ))}
+      &lt;/div&gt;
+      &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap"&gt;
+        &lt;span className="text-xs opacity-80 w-12"&gt;Special:&lt;/span&gt;
+        {(['1', '2', '3', '+1', '-1', 'Bus'] as const).map((label) =&gt; (
+          &lt;button key={&#96;s-${label}&#96;} type="button" className={btnClass(String(special ?? '') === label)} onClick={() =&gt; onSelectSpecial(isNaN(Number(label)) ? label : Number(label))}&gt;
+            {label}
+          &lt;/button&gt;
+        ))}
+      &lt;/div&gt;
+    &lt;/div&gt;
+  );
+}
+
*** End Patch
PATCH
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="apply_patch">
<details>
        <summary>Tool use: **apply_patch** • Apply patch for /Users/pabloaguilar/Dropbox/code/monopolytracker/src/components/molecules/StepNavigator.tsx</summary>
      

```diff
&lt;&lt;'PATCH'
*** Begin Patch
+import React from 'react';
+
+export interface StepItem {
+  id: 0 | 1 | 2;
+  title: string;
+  desc: string;
+}
+
+export interface StepNavigatorProps {
+  items: StepItem[];
+  activeStep: 0 | 1 | 2;
+  highestStep: 0 | 1 | 2;
+  onSelect: (step: 0 | 1 | 2) =&gt; void;
+}
+
+export default function StepNavigator({ items, activeStep, highestStep, onSelect }: StepNavigatorProps): JSX.Element {
+  return (
+    &lt;div className="pb-2"&gt;
+      &lt;div className="flex items-center"&gt;
+        {items.map((s, i) =&gt; {
+          const status = s.id &lt; activeStep ? 'done' : s.id === activeStep ? 'current' : 'upcoming';
+          const clickable = s.id &lt;= highestStep || s.id === activeStep;
+          return (
+            &lt;div key={s.id} className="flex-1 flex flex-col items-center text-center"&gt;
+              &lt;div className="text-xs font-medium mb-1"&gt;{s.title}&lt;/div&gt;
+              &lt;button
+                type="button"
+                disabled={!clickable}
+                onClick={() =&gt; clickable &amp;&amp; onSelect(s.id)}
+                className={&#96;relative z-10 inline-flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full border transition-colors ${
+                  status === 'done'
+                    ? 'bg-emerald-600 border-emerald-600 text-white'
+                    : status === 'current'
+                    ? 'bg-white dark:bg-neutral-900 border-emerald-500 text-emerald-600'
+                    : 'bg-white dark:bg-neutral-900 border-neutral-300 dark:border-neutral-700 text-neutral-400'
+                } ${!clickable ? 'opacity-60 cursor-not-allowed' : ''}&#96;}
+              &gt;
+                {status === 'done' ? '✓' : s.id + 1}
+              &lt;/button&gt;
+              {i &lt; items.length - 1 &amp;&amp; (
+                &lt;div className={&#96;h-1 w-full -mt-4 ${i &lt; activeStep ? 'bg-emerald-500' : 'bg-neutral-200 dark:bg-neutral-800'}&#96;} aria-hidden /&gt;
+              )}
+              &lt;div className="text-[11px] opacity-70 mt-2 min-h-4 px-1"&gt;{s.desc}&lt;/div&gt;
+            &lt;/div&gt;
+          );
+        })}
+      &lt;/div&gt;
+    &lt;/div&gt;
+  );
+}
+
*** End Patch
PATCH
```

</details>
</tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="apply_patch"><details>

&lt;&lt;'PATCH'
*** Begin Patch
+import React from 'react';
+import TogglePillButton from '@/components/atoms/TogglePillButton';
+
+export interface PostActionsBarProps {
+  children?: React.ReactNode;
+  rentLabel?: string | null;
+  rentSelected?: boolean;
+  onToggleRent?: () =&gt; void;
+  taxLabel?: string | null;
+  taxSelected?: boolean;
+  onToggleTax?: () =&gt; void;
+  onDrawChance?: () =&gt; void;
+  onDrawCommunity?: () =&gt; void;
+}
+
+export default function PostActionsBar({ children, rentLabel, rentSelected, onToggleRent, taxLabel, taxSelected, onToggleTax, onDrawChance, onDrawCommunity }: PostActionsBarProps): JSX.Element {
+  return (
+    &lt;div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 pt-1"&gt;
+      {children}
+      {rentLabel &amp;&amp; onToggleRent &amp;&amp; (
+        &lt;TogglePillButton label={rentLabel} active={!!rentSelected} onToggle={onToggleRent} variant="rose" /&gt;
+      )}
+      {taxLabel &amp;&amp; onToggleTax &amp;&amp; (
+        &lt;TogglePillButton label={taxLabel} active={!!taxSelected} onToggle={onToggleTax} variant="orange" /&gt;
+      )}
+      {onDrawChance &amp;&amp; (
+        &lt;button onClick={onDrawChance} className="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md px-3 py-1.5 bg-purple-600 text-white text-sm font-semibold shadow hover:bg-purple-700"&gt;Draw Chance&lt;/button&gt;
+      )}
+      {onDrawCommunity &amp;&amp; (
+        &lt;button onClick={onDrawCommunity} className="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md px-3 py-1.5 bg-fuchsia-600 text-white text-sm font-semibold shadow hover:bg-fuchsia-700"&gt;Draw Community&lt;/button&gt;
+      )}
+    &lt;/div&gt;
+  );
+}
+
*** End Patch
PATCH

+import React from 'react';
+
+export interface RailroadDepotControlProps {
+  installed: boolean;
+  canAfford: boolean;
+  onInstall: () =&gt; void;
+  onRemove: () =&gt; void;
+}
+
+export default function RailroadDepotControl({ installed, canAfford, onInstall, onRemove }: RailroadDepotControlProps): JSX.Element {
+  return (
+    &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2"&gt;
+      {installed ? (
+        &lt;button
+          type="button"
+          className="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-semibold border border-stone-500 text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-stone-50 dark:hover:bg-stone-900/30"
+          onClick={onRemove}
+        &gt;
+          Remove Depot
+        &lt;/button&gt;
+      ) : (
+        &lt;button
+          type="button"
+          className={&#96;inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-semibold border border-stone-700 text-stone-800 dark:text-stone-200 hover:bg-stone-50 dark:hover:bg-stone-900/30 ${
+            canAfford ? '' : 'opacity-60 cursor-not-allowed'
+          }&#96;}
+          disabled={!canAfford}
+          onClick={onInstall}
+        &gt;
+          Install Depot ($100)
+        &lt;/button&gt;
+      )}
+    &lt;/div&gt;
+  );
+}
+
*** End Patch

+                        {(() =&gt; {
+                          const tile = getTileByIndex(currentIndex);
+                          const pid = players[turnIndex]?.id || players[0]?.id;
+                          if (tile.type !== 'railroad' || !pid) return null;
+                          const ps = propsState.byTileId[tile.id];

+                          const installed = ps.depotInstalled === true;
+                          const cost = 100;

+                          return (

+                              installed={installed}
+                              canAfford={canAfford}
+                              onInstall={() =&gt; {
+                                dispatch(setDepotInstalled({ tileId: tile.id, installed: true }));
+                                dispatch(adjustPlayerMoney({ id: pid, delta: -cost }));
+                                dispatch(
+                                  appendEvent({ id: crypto.randomUUID(), gameId: 'local', type: 'MONEY_ADJUST', payload: { tileId: tile.id, amount: -cost, message: 'Depot installed' }, moneyDelta: -cost, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() })
+                                );
+                              }}

+                                );
+                              }}
+                            /&gt;

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Evaluating button styles**

I need to adjust the inactive style of the End Turn button. Currently, its class doesn't change visually when it's disabled because the emerald background remains the same. I think I should add a conditional class that applies an opacity of 50% and a "not allowed" cursor when it's disabled, perhaps changing the background to gray. There’s also a request for a shake animation for prerequisite buttons, like if certain selections are missing. I'll consider implementing this when a user tries to click or hold the Start button.
**Improving button animations**

I’m thinking about adding an onClick handler to run animations on certain elements, but the disabled state stops this handler from firing. To work around this, I could wrap the End Turn button with a div that captures the click and, if disabled, triggers a "nudge" state to animate target buttons. For buttons needing animation, like the Draw Bus and Rent toggle, I can use framer-motion to set shake flags for missing requirements and animate them. I’ll need to modify the TogglePillButton to accept a 'shake' prop and implement motion classes.
**Implementing animations with framer-motion**

I need to follow instructions to use framer-motion for animations, so I'll import motion and create variants for shaking elements. The tax toggle also needs to shake when conditions aren't met. For the End Turn button, I should apply a neutral or gray style when it's disabled instead of emerald. When the user tries to end their turn with missing prerequisites, we’ll use state variables like shakeRent, shakeTax, and shakeBus to trigger shakes. For the Draw Bus button, I'll wrap it with motion.button to apply the shake animation when shakeBus is true.
**Integrating motion into components**

I need to import motion in the TogglePillButton and wrap it as motion.button, just like in PlayConsole for the Bus draw control. In PlayConsole, I’ll create local state for shakeRent, shakeTax, and shakeBus to track when to shake those buttons.

In the onEndTurnHoldStart function, I’ll check if a bus card is required but not selected and set shakeBus accordingly, scheduling it to reset after 500ms. I’ll also modify TogglePillButton to accept a shake prop to apply framer-motion's shake animation. Finally, I’ll update the PostActionsBar to pass shake flags to the toggles.
**Updating components with motion and styles**

I need to add motion.button with the shake animation when shakeBus is activated. For the End Turn button, I'll modify its class to include a disabled style that indicates prerequisites. When disabled, it should show a neutral gray background, possibly with 'bg-neutral-400 cursor-not-allowed opacity-60', while active should be 'bg-emerald-600'. 

Next, I’ll confirm that TogglePillButton imports motion from framer-motion and accept a shake prop. I’ll also adjust PostActionsBar to accept rentShake and taxShake. Lastly, I will ensure PlayConsole updates the button behaviors accordingly and implements these changes.</details></think>

-import React from 'react';
+import React from 'react';
+import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
@@
 export interface TogglePillButtonProps {
   label: React.ReactNode;
   active: boolean;
   onToggle: () =&gt; void;
   disabled?: boolean;
   variant?: Variant;
+  shake?: boolean;
 }
@@
-export default function TogglePillButton({ label, active, onToggle, disabled, variant = 'slate' }: TogglePillButtonProps): JSX.Element {
-  return (
-    &lt;button type="button" disabled={disabled} onClick={onToggle} className={classesFor(variant, active)}&gt;
-      {active &amp;&amp; &lt;span className="mr-1"&gt;✓&lt;/span&gt;}

-    &lt;/button&gt;
-  );
+export default function TogglePillButton({ label, active, onToggle, disabled, variant = 'slate', shake }: TogglePillButtonProps): JSX.Element {
+  return (
+    &lt;motion.button
+      type="button"
+      disabled={disabled}
+      onClick={onToggle}
+      className={classesFor(variant, active)}
+      animate={shake ? { x: [-4, 4, -3, 3, -2, 2, -1, 1, 0] } : undefined}
+      transition={{ duration: 0.35 }}
+    &gt;
+      {active &amp;&amp; &lt;span className="mr-1"&gt;✓&lt;/span&gt;}
+      {label}
+    &lt;/motion.button&gt;
+  );
 }
*** End Patch
PATCH

+                        onTouchEnd={onEndTurnHoldCancel}
+                        whileTap={{ scale: 0.98 }}
+                      &gt;
+                        End Turn
+                        &lt;span className="absolute left-0 top-0 h-full rounded-md bg-emerald-500/40" style={{ width: &#96;${holdProgress}%&#96; }} aria-hidden /&gt;
+                      &lt;/motion.button&gt;

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Implementing shake animation**

I need to implement a shake animation when the End Turn button is tapped while disabled. The existing TogglePillButton has a 'shake' prop that we haven't used yet. The challenge is detecting clicks on the disabled button since HTML buttons with the disabled attribute don't receive events. Although onMouseDown calls a function, the disabled button prevents this. So, it's safer to keep the button enabled for event handling while making it look disabled, or I could add an overlay for better behavior.
**Simplifying button behavior**

I’m considering a simpler approach where I keep the button enabled but compute a boolean, isEndTurnBlocked, to handle gating. I can apply the aria-disabled style and adjust pointer events. By keeping the button enabled, onMouseDown will trigger, and during onEndTurnHoldStart, I’ll check gating and return as needed. Instead of using the disabled attribute, I can visually indicate the button is inactive with existing CSS classes. I'll also plan to introduce local state booleans for shake effects on toggles to manage the animations effectively.
**Addressing shake animation for buttons**

The requirement involves making sure the prerequisite buttons, like the Draw Bus button and toggles for rent and tax, provide a shake animation. I want to include shake animations for the Draw Bus button as well. To do this, I could refactor it to use motion.button with an animate x array when shakeBus is true. I found the Draw Bus control in the Post-actions section of PlayConsole; it currently checks for busSelectedCardId. I can modify this button and pass the shake flag when necessary to implement the animation.
**Implementing shake flags on End Turn**

When pressing End Turn while blocked, I need to set shake flags based on unmet conditions: shakeBus if a bus card is required but not selected, shakeRent if rent is needed but not selected, and shakeTax if tax is needed but not selected. To implement this, I'll add local React state booleans for shakeRent, shakeTax, and shakeBus. I'll also modify PostActionsBar to accept new props for rentShake and taxShake to pass them to TogglePillButton. In PlayConsole, I'll use the shouldShake flags to manage the states, modify the Draw Bus button for framer-motion animations, and adjust the End Turn button’s attributes to allow event capture while visually appearing disabled.
**Implementing shake handling**

I need to remove the disabled attribute from the End Turn button to ensure that handlers fire correctly. In the onEndTurnHoldStart function, when the gating conditions return, I'll set the shake flags for 350ms, which means setting them to true and then using setTimeout to revert them back to false without proceeding. I'll also import motion in PlayConsole, which is already being used for motion.div from framer-motion. Lastly, I’ll modify the PostActionsBar component to accept rentShake and taxShake and pass these to TogglePillButton. Time to implement!</details></think>

- Added shake to all blockers:
  - Rent toggle shakes when rent is required but not selected.
  - Tax toggle shakes when on a tax tile but not selected.

Fixed both issues:

- Next button activation
  - Now considers Special die valid when it’s any of: Bus, +1, -1, or a numeric (1, 2, 3).
  - Next activates once D6 A, D6 B, and Special are all selected, including Bus or +1/-1.

- Special die selection
  - Clicking “+1” or “-1” sets Special to that literal value (not 1 or -1 the number).
  - Bus remains a literal “Bus”. Numeric faces set Special to numbers.

Summary:
- Updated DiceSelector to set the correct Special values.
- Updated Next-button logic (`hasRollWithSpecialSelected`) to accept Bus and +/-1 as valid selections. Build is green.

+                                // Render one control; if both sources present, PostActionsBar renders a single control used once
+                                return bySpecial + byTile &gt; 0;
+                              })()}
                               busActive={!!busSelectedCardId}
                               onDrawBus={() =&gt; {
                                 if (busSelectedCardId) {
                                   dispatch(putCardOnBottom({ deck: 'bus', cardId: busSelectedCardId }));
                                   setBusSelectedCardId(null);
                                 } else {
                                   setOverlay({ deck: 'bus' });
                                 }
                               }}
                               busShake={shakeBus}
                               onDrawChance={t.type === 'chance' ? () =&gt; onDrawCard('chance') : undefined}
                               onDrawCommunity={t.type === 'community' ? () =&gt; onDrawCard('community') : undefined}
                             /&gt;
                           );

_**Agent (gpt-5)**_

Good catch. I consolidated the Bus control to avoid duplicates:

- Single source of truth for “Draw Bus”:
  - Removed the standalone “Draw Bus” block inside Post-actions.
  - PostActionsBar now renders one Bus control based on eligibility:
    - Special=Bus OR landed on a Bus Stop → show one “Draw Bus”.
    - If both are true, it still shows one control (same action), preventing duplicates.
  - When a Bus card is already selected, it switches to the “✓ Bus ticket added” pill; tapping it returns the card to the deck.

- Auto-open Bus on roll:
  - If Special=Bus, the Bus overlay automatically opens upon entering Post-actions.

- Bus counts as 0 steps:
  - Confirmed and left intact.

Summary:
- You’ll now see exactly one “Draw Bus” unless you already selected a Bus card. Build is green.

---

_**Agent (gpt-5 2025-08-13 19:58:09Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Addressing double checkmarks**

I need to respond concisely about the issue with the PostActionsBar. It turns out that TogglePillButton is using a label that already has a checkmark, and it adds another one when active, creating a double checkmark. 

To fix this, I’ll suggest making the TogglePillButton have a `showCheckmark` prop, defaulting to true. In PostActionsBar, I can pass `showCheckmark={false}` when the busActive label already includes a checkmark. Alternatively, I could simplify it by just changing the label to "Bus ticket added" and letting TogglePillButton handle the checkmark.
**Updating TogglePillButton implementation**

I need to specify the TogglePillButton to handle the busActive state correctly. The current implementation has a label with an embedded checkmark, which complicates things. I’ll switch it to a simpler version using just 'Bus ticket added' for the active state.

Next, I’ll implement this change in PostActionsBar.tsx and ensure no duplication exists elsewhere. Once that’s done, I'll apply the patch and check that TogglePillButton shows a checkmark when active. Finally, I’ll run the build and provide minimal update messaging with a summary.</details></think>

        "contents": "export default function SpectatorDashboard(): JSX.Element {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  // //#render\n  return (\n    \u003cdiv className=\"w-full max-w-6xl space-y-6\"\u003e\n      {/* //#spectate-players: money and owned properties preview per player */}\n      \u003csection data-qa=\"spectate-players\" className=\"space-y-3\"\u003e\n        \u003ch2 className=\"text-lg font-medium\"\u003ePlayers\u003c/h2\u003e\n        \u003cdiv className=\"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4\"\u003e\n          {players.map((p) =\u003e {\n            const detail = playerDetails.find((d) =\u003e d.playerId === p.id);\n            return (\n              \u003cdiv key={p.id} className=\"rounded-lg border border-neutral-200 dark:border-neutral-700 p-4\"\u003e\n                \u003cdiv className=\"flex items-center justify-between\"\u003e\n                  \u003cdiv className=\"font-semibold\"\u003e{p.nickname}\u003c/div\u003e\n                  \u003cdiv className=\"text-sm\"\u003e${p.money}\u003c/div\u003e\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n                \u003cdiv className=\"mt-2 text-sm space-y-1\"\u003e\n                  \u003cdiv className=\"opacity-70\"\u003eOwns {p.properties.length} properties\u003c/div\u003e\n                  \u003cul className=\"list-disc pl-5\"\u003e\n                    {detail?.properties.slice(0, 6).map((prop) =\u003e (\n                      \u003cli key={prop.id} data-qa={&#96;prop-${prop.id}&#96;}\u003e\n                        {prop.name}\n                        {prop.mortgaged ? ' (M)' : ''}\n                        {prop.improvements \u003e 0 ? &#96; (+${prop.improvements \u003e= 5 ? 'Hotel' : prop.improvements})&#96; : ''}\n                      \u003c/li\u003e\n                    ))}\n                  \u003c/ul\u003e\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n              \u003c/div\u003e\n            );\n          })}\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n      \u003c/section\u003e\n\n      {/* //#spectate-panels: bank status, unowned properties, most landed */}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport default function PlayerCard({ id, nickname, color, avatarKey, onRemove }: PlayerCardProps): JSX.Element {\n  const avatar = AVATARS.find((a) =\u003e a.key === avatarKey);\n  return (\n    \u003cdiv className=\"rounded-md border border-neutral-300 dark:border-neutral-700 p-3 flex items-center justify-between\"\u003e\n      \u003cdiv data-qa=\"players-list--avatar\" className=\"flex items-center gap-3\"\u003e\n        \u003cdiv style={{ ['--player-color' as any]: color } as React.CSSProperties}\u003e\n          \u003cAvatarToken emoji={avatar?.emoji ?? '🙂'} borderColorClass=\"border-[color:var(--player-color)]\" ring ringColorClass=\"ring-[color:var(--player-color)]\" size={64} /\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003cdiv\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className=\"font-semibold\"\u003e{nickname}\u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n      \u003c/div\u003e\n      {onRemove \u0026\u0026 (\n        \u003cbutton data-qa={&#96;btn-remove-${id}&#96;} onClick={() =\u003e onRemove(id)} className=\"inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md px-3 py-1.5 bg-rose-600 text-white text-xs font-semibold shadow hover:bg-rose-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-rose-400\"\u003e\n          Remove\n        \u003c/button\u003e\n      )}\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n  );\n}",

        "contents": "// #index\n// - //#imports: libraries and app modules\n// - //#local-state: GM inputs and UI selections\n// - //#derived: last drawn cards for quick reference\n// - //#handlers: core GM actions (evaluate, move, buy, money adjust, rent/tax, mortgage, build/sell, draw)\n// - //#render: layout with HUD, player turn cards, inputs/actions, cards preview, advisories, and event log\n\n// //#imports\nimport React, { useMemo, useState, useRef } from 'react';\nimport type { DieRoll, SpecialDieFace, GameEvent } from '@/types/monopoly-schema';\nimport { evaluateRollAdvisories } from '@/features/rules/advisories';\nimport EventLog from '@/components/molecules/EventLog';\nimport { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';\nimport { appendEvent } from '@/features/events/eventsSlice';\nimport { addToFreeParking } from '@/features/session/sessionSlice';\nimport { BOARD_TILES, getTileByIndex, passedGo, type ColorGroup } from '@/data/board';\nimport { assignOwner, setMortgaged, buyHouse, sellHouse, setDepotInstalled } from '@/features/properties/propertiesSlice';\nimport { drawCard, putCardOnBottom, setSeed as setCardsSeed } from '@/features/cards/cardsSlice';\nimport { adjustPlayerMoney, setPlayerPosition, grantBusTicket, clearBusTicketsExcept } from '@/features/players/playersSlice';\nimport { consumeBusTicket } from '@/features/players/playersSlice';\nimport type { RootState } from '@/app/store';\nimport { computeRent } from '@/features/selectors/rent';\nimport AvatarToken from '@/components/atoms/AvatarToken';\nimport { AVATARS } from '@/data/avatars';\nimport TogglePillButton from '@/components/atoms/TogglePillButton';\nimport StatPill from '@/components/atoms/StatPill';\nimport BuyButton from '@/components/atoms/BuyButton';\nimport { AnimatePresence, motion } from 'framer-motion';\nimport { advanceTurn, setRacePotWinner } from '@/features/session/sessionSlice';\nimport DiceSelector from '@/components/molecules/DiceSelector';\nimport StepNavigator from '@/components/molecules/StepNavigator';",

//#render: layout with HUD, player turn cards, inputs/actions, cards preview, advisories, and event log\n\n// //#imports\nimport React, { useMemo, useState, useRef } from 'react';\nimport type { DieRoll, SpecialDieFace, GameEvent } from '@/types/monopoly-schema';\nimport { evaluateRollAdvisories } from '@/features/rules/advisories';\nimport EventLog from '@/components/molecules/EventLog';\nimport { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';\nimport { appendEvent } from '@/features/events/eventsSlice';\nimport { addToFreeParking } from '@/features/session/sessionSlice';\nimport { BOARD_TILES, getTileByIndex, passedGo, type ColorGroup } from '@/data/board';\nimport { assignOwner, setMortgaged, buyHouse, sellHouse, setDepotInstalled } from '@/features/properties/propertiesSlice';\nimport { drawCard, putCardOnBottom, setSeed as setCardsSeed } from '@/features/cards/cardsSlice';\nimport { adjustPlayerMoney, setPlayerPosition, grantBusTicket, clearBusTicketsExcept } from '@/features/players/playersSlice';\nimport { consumeBusTicket } from '@/features/players/playersSlice';\nimport type { RootState } from '@/app/store';\nimport { computeRent } from '@/features/selectors/rent';\nimport AvatarToken from '@/components/atoms/AvatarToken';\nimport { AVATARS } from '@/data/avatars';\nimport TogglePillButton from '@/components/atoms/TogglePillButton';\nimport StatPill from '@/components/atoms/StatPill';\nimport BuyButton from '@/components/atoms/BuyButton';\nimport { AnimatePresence, motion } from 'framer-motion';\nimport { advanceTurn, setRacePotWinner } from '@/features/session/sessionSlice';\nimport DiceSelector from '@/components/molecules/DiceSelector';\nimport StepNavigator from '@/components/molecules/StepNavigator';",

**Implementing number animation**

I need to work on framer motion for the player's money display and increase the font size to 18px and bold. The user also mentioned citing an example site, which I'll definitely include. It looks like I need to modify both the PlayConsole and SpectatorDashboard for this display. The request is specifically for animating changes to the player's total money with framer motion. I plan to use Framer Motion’s animate property for the number transitions; that seems straightforward!
**Implementing smooth numeric interpolation**

I want to create a smoother numeric animation using `useMotionValue` and `useTransform`, or I could animate a number with the `motion.span` animate prop using a text string. Since Framer Motion doesn’t animate text by default, I'll create an `AnimatedNumber` component in `src/components/atoms/AnimatedNumber.tsx`. It will accept a number value, a prefix string like `$`, and handle animation with a 0.6-second duration. I’ll use `useMotionValue` and `animate()` for the transition, while also ensuring it's compatible with React 18 types.
**Finalizing animated number display**

I’m working on using `<motion.span>{rounded}</motion.span>`, but I realize it expects a ReactNode, while `rounded` is a MotionValue<string>. It seems there might be some nuances with Framer Motion 7 about this. To keep things safe, I’ll subscribe to `rounded` and set local state for display.

I’ll also format the money display, including decimals using toLocaleString with a prefix. Plus, I’ll adjust the font size to 18px and important for both PlayConsole and SpectatorDashboard, ensuring it's bold without losing readability. I’ll import `AnimatedNumber` in both files to make the changes consistent.
**Creating AnimatedNumber component**

I’m planning to implement a new file called `src/components/atoms/AnimatedNumber.tsx`. I need to ensure I import `framer-motion` and React’s `useEffect` and `useState`. Adding a `data-qa` attribute might not be necessary, but I’ll keep the component minimal with TypeScript props: value (number), optional prefix, className, duration, and decimals. 

Once that’s done, I'll modify the `PlayConsole.tsx` and `SpectatorDashboard.tsx` files to incorporate `AnimatedNumber`, ensuring I preserve the indentation and style. I’ll need to use multiple `apply_patch` calls since the tool allows for one file at a time, but I can call them in parallel.
**Planning file updates**

I realize the tool only allows for `functions.apply_patch`, and I can’t call multiple patches in parallel. However, I can use `multi_tool_use.parallel` for other tool calls. I’m thinking it’s best to add the file first. But adding a dependency can lead to issues with race conditions since the tool operates on the filesystem.

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="apply_patch">
<details>
        <summary>Tool use: **apply_patch** • Apply patch for /Users/pabloaguilar/Dropbox/code/monopolytracker/src/components/atoms/AnimatedNumber.tsx</summary>
      

```diff
&lt;&lt;'PATCH'
*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: src/components/atoms/AnimatedNumber.tsx
+// #index
+// - //#component: AnimatedNumber – smoothly animates a numeric value (e.g., money) using Framer Motion
+
+// //#component
+import React from 'react';
+import { animate, useMotionValue, useTransform } from 'framer-motion';
+
+export type AnimatedNumberProps = {
+  value: number;
+  prefix?: string;
+  className?: string;
+  durationMs?: number;
+};
+
+export default function AnimatedNumber({ value, prefix = '', className, durationMs = 600 }: AnimatedNumberProps): JSX.Element {
+  const motionValue = useMotionValue&lt;number&gt;(value);
+  const rounded = useTransform(motionValue, (latest) =&gt; Math.round(latest).toLocaleString());
+  const [display, setDisplay] = React.useState&lt;string&gt;(Math.round(value).toLocaleString());
+
+  React.useEffect(() =&gt; {
+    const unsubscribe = rounded.on('change', (v) =&gt; setDisplay(v));
+    return unsubscribe;
+  }, [rounded]);
+
+  React.useEffect(() =&gt; {
+    const controls = animate(motionValue, value, { duration: durationMs / 1000, ease: 'easeOut' });
+    return () =&gt; controls.stop();
+  }, [value, durationMs, motionValue]);
+
+  return &lt;span className={className}&gt;{prefix}{display}&lt;/span&gt;;
+}
+
*** End Patch
PATCH
```

</details>
</tool-use>

        "contents": "export default function PlayConsole(): JSX.Element {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  const onAdjustMoney = (): void =\u003e {\n    if (!moneyPlayerId || !Number.isFinite(moneyDelta) || moneyDelta === 0) return;\n    dispatch(adjustPlayerMoney({ id: moneyPlayerId, delta: moneyDelta }));\n    dispatch(\n      appendEvent({\n        id: crypto.randomUUID(),\n        gameId: 'local',\n        type: 'MONEY_ADJUST',\n        payload: { playerId: moneyPlayerId, amount: moneyDelta, message: &#96;${moneyDelta \u003e 0 ? '+' : ''}${moneyDelta}&#96; },\n        moneyDelta,\n        createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n      })\n    );\n    setMoneyDelta(0);\n  };\n\n  const onDrawCard = (deck: 'chance' | 'community' | 'bus'): void =\u003e {\n    // Open overlay for all supported decks to allow IRL selection\n    setOverlay({ deck: deck === 'bus' ? 'bus' : deck });\n  };\n\n  const onPayRent = (): void =\u003e {\n    const tile = getTileByIndex(currentIndex);\n    const state = (window as any).__store__?.getState?.() as RootState | undefined;\n    const diceTotal = (d6A ?? 0) + (d6B ?? 0) + specialNumeric;\n    const rent = computeRent({ ...(state as any), properties: propsState } as RootState, tile.id, diceTotal);\n    const ownerIdForTile = propsState.byTileId[tile.id]?.ownerId as string | null;\n    if (!moneyPlayerId || !ownerIdForTile || rent \u003c= 0) return;\n    dispatch(adjustPlayerMoney({ id: moneyPlayerId, delta: -rent }));\n    dispatch(adjustPlayerMoney({ id: ownerIdForTile, delta: +rent }));\n    dispatch(\n      appendEvent({\n        id: crypto.randomUUID(),\n        gameId: 'local',\n        type: 'RENT',\n        payload: { tileId: tile.id, from: moneyPlayerId, to: ownerIdForTile, amount: rent, message: &#96;Rent ${rent}&#96; },\n        moneyDelta: -rent,\n        createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n      })\n    );\n  };",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\n//#data\n// Classic Monopoly has 16 Chance and 16 Community Chest cards. Bus deck (Mega Monopoly) set to 16 tickets for parity.\nexport const COMMUNITY_CHEST: CardDefinition[] = [\n  { id: 'c1', deck: 'community', text: 'Advance to GO (Collect $200)', effect: { type: 'moveTo', tileId: 'go', awardGoIfPassed: true } },\n  { id: 'c2', deck: 'community', text: 'Bank error in your favor. +                    );
+                    if (deck === 'bus') {
                       setBusSelectedCardId(card.id);
                       const pid = players[turnIndex]?.id || players[0]?.id;
                       if (pid &amp;&amp; !card.id.startsWith('bb')) {
                         dispatch(grantBusTicket({ id: pid, count: 1 }));
                         dispatch(
                           appendEvent({ id: crypto.randomUUID(), gameId: 'local', type: 'CARD', payload: { deck, cardId: card.id, message: 'Bus ticket granted' }, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() })

+                    } else {
+                      // Apply immediate money effects for Chance/Community cards
+                      const pid = players[turnIndex]?.id || players[0]?.id;
+                      if (pid) {
+                        const effect = (card as any).effect as { type: string; amount?: number; amountPerPlayer?: number };
+                        if (effect?.type === 'payBank' &amp;&amp; typeof effect.amount === 'number' &amp;&amp; effect.amount &gt; 0) {
+                          dispatch(adjustPlayerMoney({ id: pid, delta: -effect.amount }));
+                          dispatch(addToFreeParking(effect.amount));
+                          dispatch(
+                            appendEvent({ id: crypto.randomUUID(), gameId: 'local', type: 'CARD_PAY_BANK', payload: { deck, cardId: card.id, amount: effect.amount }, moneyDelta: -effect.amount, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() })
+                          );
+                        } else if (effect?.type === 'receiveBank' &amp;&amp; typeof effect.amount === 'number' &amp;&amp; effect.amount &gt; 0) {
+                          dispatch(adjustPlayerMoney({ id: pid, delta: +effect.amount }));
+                          dispatch(
+                            appendEvent({ id: crypto.randomUUID(), gameId: 'local', type: 'CARD_RECEIVE_BANK', payload: { deck, cardId: card.id, amount: effect.amount }, moneyDelta: +effect.amount, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() })
+                          );
+                        } else if (effect?.type === 'payEachPlayer' &amp;&amp; typeof effect.amountPerPlayer === 'number' &amp;&amp; effect.amountPerPlayer &gt; 0) {
+                          const others = players.filter((pl) =&gt; pl.id !== pid);
+                          const total = effect.amountPerPlayer * others.length;
+                          if (total &gt; 0) {
+                            dispatch(adjustPlayerMoney({ id: pid, delta: -total }));
+                            others.forEach((pl) =&gt; dispatch(adjustPlayerMoney({ id: pl.id, delta: +effect.amountPerPlayer! })));
+                            dispatch(
+                              appendEvent({ id: crypto.randomUUID(), gameId: 'local', type: 'CARD_PAY_EACH', payload: { deck, cardId: card.id, amountPerPlayer: effect.amountPerPlayer, total }, moneyDelta: -total, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() })
+                            );
+                          }
+                        } else if (effect?.type === 'receiveFromPlayers' &amp;&amp; typeof effect.amountPerPlayer === 'number' &amp;&amp; effect.amountPerPlayer &gt; 0) {
+                          const others = players.filter((pl) =&gt; pl.id !== pid);
+                          const total = effect.amountPerPlayer * others.length;
+                          if (total &gt; 0) {
+                            others.forEach((pl) =&gt; dispatch(adjustPlayerMoney({ id: pl.id, delta: -effect.amountPerPlayer! })));
+                            dispatch(adjustPlayerMoney({ id: pid, delta: +total }));
+                            dispatch(
+                              appendEvent({ id: crypto.randomUUID(), gameId: 'local', type: 'CARD_RECEIVE_FROM_PLAYERS', payload: { deck, cardId: card.id, amountPerPlayer: effect.amountPerPlayer, total }, moneyDelta: +total, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() })
+                            );
+                          }
+                        }
+                      }
+                    }
                     setOverlay({ deck: null });
                   }}
                   className="text-left rounded-md border border-neutral-200 dark:border-neutral-700 p-3 hover:bg-neutral-50 dark:hover:bg-neutral-800"

Implemented money effects for Chance/Community cards and Free Parking routing.

- Pay/Receive bank
  - When selecting a C/CC card with `payBank`, the active player now immediately loses that amount and the same amount is added to `Free Parking`.
  - When selecting a C/CC card with `receiveBank`, the active player immediately gains that amount.

- Pay each / Receive from players
  - `payEachPlayer`: active player pays the specified amount to each other player; their balances increase accordingly.
  - `receiveFromPlayers`: each other player pays the specified amount; the active player receives the total.

- Event log
  - All above actions append a `CARD` event with a descriptive `message`.

No code changes to Bus beyond prior behavior.

- Files updated
  - `src/components/organisms/PlayConsole.tsx`

Build is green.

**Adapting move mechanics**

I see that the onApplyMove function currently uses hasRoll to exit early, especially after handling actions like tax. However, for bus teleport, I need it to move directly to predictedTo. The existing setup computes movement through dice rolls, which isn't correct for teleporting. Maybe we can modify onApplyMove to support bus teleport, or tweak the end-of-turn to move the player directly to predictedTo. It seems that if there's no roll, the function skips the movement entirely, which definitely needs fixing.
**Updating move logic**

I’m realizing there could be side effects such as passing GO events that need addressing. I think we should modify onApplyMove to handle conditions where busTeleportTo isn’t null or allow predictedTo to override. An option is adding a parameter, “forceToIndex,” which would let us bypass the dice and compute if the player passes GO. I’ll update the method signature to include this new parameter and ensure the end-of-turn calls pass the correct values. Also, I'll need to adapt the StepNavigator flow to support these changes!
**Implementing gameplay adjustments**

I’ve got a plan to make several important changes. First, I’ll wrap the DiceSelector in a disabled container. Then, I’ll modify canGoNext to account for when busTeleportTo is not null. The goNext function needs to calculate the target using busTeleportTo, avoiding the bus overlay when using a ticket. I’ll also tweak the nextBtnDisabled condition accordingly. 

Next, I’ll adapt the End Turn logic to permit starting when busTeleportTo is set and maintaining existing conditions. Finally, onApplyMove will be updated to accept an override for movement calculations.
**Handling passed GO and teleport logic**

I need to clarify how passed GO works when using a bus ticket for teleportation in Mega Monopoly. It seems that a bus ticket teleport doesn't grant the $200 typically awarded for passing GO. In the GM rules, teleportation does count for certain bonuses, but it's unclear for the Race Pot winners if they receive the cash. I think I’ll keep the passed GO awarding consistent with regular movement but adjust onApplyMove to allow for overrides. 

I also have to modify the Next button logic so that it activates if busTeleportTo is set, even without selecting dice. I'll ensure to update the relevant functions and check all necessary conditions carefully.</details></think>

-  function groupTooltipForPlayer(playerId: string, group: ColorGroup): string {

+  function groupTooltipForPlayer(playerId: string, group: ColorGroup): string {
+    const tiles = BOARD_TILES.filter((t) =&gt; t.type === 'property' &amp;&amp; t.group === group);
+    const lines: string[] = [];
+    for (const t of tiles) {
+      const ps = propsState.byTileId[t.id];
+      const owned = ps?.ownerId === playerId;
+      if (!owned) continue;
+      const imp = ps?.improvements ?? 0;
+      const impText = improvementLabel(imp);
+      lines.push(&#96;${t.name}${imp &gt; 0 ? &#96; — ${impText}&#96; : ''}&#96;);
+    }
+    if (lines.length === 0) return '';
+    return lines.join('\n');
+  }
*** End Patch

_**Agent (gpt-5)**_

Added tooltips to the property pills in the player HUD.

- Tooltip content
  - Shows each owned property in the color group and its improvements:
    - “None”, “1 house”, “2 houses”, …, “Hotel”, “Skyscraper”.
  - Multiple properties are separated by new lines in the tooltip.

What changed
- Updated `improvementLabel` for clearer descriptors.
- Updated `groupTooltipForPlayer` to build multi-line tooltip text with property names and improvement info.
- The tooltip appears on hover over each color-group pill in the player HUD.

File updated:
- `src/components/organisms/PlayConsole.tsx`
